response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, architecture, and leadership across diverse industries, with a strong focus on open-source technologies and Linux environments. His track record includes leading interdisciplinary teams, designing scalable systems, and mentoring developers. While his German is basic (not meeting the C1 requirement), his technical leadership and strategic thinking align well with the role’s core responsibilities.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience in software architecture and leadership across multiple domains (IT consulting, embedded systems, AI infrastructure)
Proven track record in open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) and contributions to complex technical systems
Strong technical versatility with expertise in Linux, Python alternatives (Node.js, Dlang), and modern development practices
concerns: German language proficiency is only at a basic level (not meeting the required C1 minimum)
Limited direct experience in IT security, risk management, and compliance (critical for the role)
No explicit mention of UML expertise or requirements management, which are listed as required qualifications
